factions.name: Optimates
factions.description: Conservative senatorial aristocracy. Defenders of tradition and senatorial privilege.

factions.name: Populares
factions.description: Reform faction. Champions of the plebs and Italian allies.

factions.name: Italian Allies
factions.description: The Socii. Demand citizenship and equal rights after generations of military service.

factions.name: Sullan Faction
factions.description: Military hardliners gathering around Lucius Cornelius Sulla.

variants.dialogue: Drusus is dead. Whatever you thought of his methods, this is not how Rome should settle its disputes.
They killed him in his own doorway. Now we all have to live with what comes next.
When they start killing tribunes in the street, citizens like us had better keep our heads down.
The Samnites have raised their eagle standard against Rome. We gave them no choice — and now we all pay for it.
Half the peninsula is in arms. Whatever faction you serve, this changes everything.
The Italian cities have turned. My cousin had business in Asculum — he barely made it out.
Sulla has crossed the pomerium with armed legions. Every precedent we built over four centuries — gone.
I never thought I would see the day. Roman soldiers marching on Rome.
The soldiers are in the streets. Whatever you're doing today, it can wait.
Seven consulships and they declare him a public enemy. The man who saved Rome from the Cimbri — a hostis.
Marius is proscribed. Anyone who sheltered him before should be having a very quiet morning.
Marius is gone. What happens to those who supported him?
The Lex Varia witch-hunt is open. Anyone who spoke in favor of Italian rights faces treason charges.
The inquisition has started. Make sure you haven't signed anything you'd regret.
They're arresting people just for having Italian friends. This city has gone mad.
